details.test: Task 1: Book Japan 7-day April 2025 tour under $2000 with 3-star for 2 adults and add to cart
Task 2: Create 'Paris Weekend' reading list with 3 Paris museum posts
Task 3: Compare two Spain beach packages in July 2025 and wishlist best one
Task 4: Select cheapest non-stop LAX-JFK bundle under $1200 and add to cart
Task 5: Subscribe to weekly budget travel newsletter with test@example.com
Task 6: Reserve family-friendly Rome hotel with filters and add free-cancel room to cart
Task 7: Configure Standard travel insurance plan for $3000 14-day trip and review
Task 8: Create and save 6-night Italy May 2025 itinerary with Rome, Florence, Venice and activities
